hero.heading: Mortgages for Self-Employed Borrowers
hero.subheading: Flexible documentation for business owners whose tax returns do not tell the full cash-flow story.

intro.heading: Self-Employed Financing
paragraphs: Searching for mortgages for self-employed borrowers near you in New York, New Jersey, Florida, or Pennsylvania? Green Street Capital is a licensed mortgage broker that compares multiple lenders for mortgages for self-employed borrowers and related programs — so you are not limited to one bank’s rules.

Write-offs and business expenses can make tax returns look lower than real cash flow. We help self-employed borrowers explore conventional paths when they fit—and alternative documentation when they do not.
Our goal is a realistic monthly payment and a file that underwriters can approve with confidence.
bullets: LLC, S-Corp, and sole proprietor owners
Business owners with strong deposits and reserves

sidebar.heading: Documentation Paths
sidebar.body: Depending on the lender, options may include full doc, bank statement, or other Non-QM structures.

faqs.question: Do I need two years of tax returns?
faqs.answer: Some programs require them; others focus on bank statements. We match the program to your documentation.

faqs.question: Can I use business bank accounts?
faqs.answer: Many bank statement programs allow business accounts with analysis of deposits and expenses.

faqs.question: Are mortgages for self-employed borrowers available in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes. Green Street Capital helps eligible borrowers explore mortgages for self-employed borrowers in New York (including NYC and surrounding areas) as a licensed mortgage broker. NMLS #2066586.

faqs.question: Can I get mortgages for self-employed borrowers in New Jersey or Florida?
faqs.answer: Often yes where licensed and program guidelines allow. We serve NY, NJ, FL, and PA — ask about mortgages for self-employed borrowers for your state.

faqs.question: How do I apply for mortgages for self-employed borrowers?
faqs.answer: Schedule a free consultation or choose a loan officer on our Team page. We will review income, credit, property, and program fit.

faqs.question: What credit score do I need for mortgages for self-employed borrowers?
faqs.answer: Requirements vary by lender and program. We review your full profile — credit is only one factor alongside income, reserves, and property type.

cta.heading: Get a self-employed mortgage review
cta.body: Share your income structure with a loan officer and explore realistic options.
